title: Recursion, Recurrences, and Divide-and-Conquer
description: Break a large document and spatial search problem into independently checkable subproblems. Learners cumulatively produce a recursive solver with recurrence evidence through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define base cases, progress measures, and combination rules before recursive calls.
Trace call trees, stack depth, repeated subproblems, and returned values.
Write and interpret recurrences for divide, solve, and combine costs.
